title: T4: CHANGELOG entry for 0.2.0
description:
Write the CHANGELOG.md entry for v0.2.0. package.json name and version are already committed (81331ee). This task only touches CHANGELOG.md.

Files: CHANGELOG.md
Depends on: nothing

Add a [0.2.0] - 2026-05-05 section above the [Unreleased] header with Changed and Added subsections. Update bottom version links. Run npm run typecheck && npm run test to verify no regressions.

title: T3: Update composeSessionName tests + add composeFooterStatus tests
description: Update existing composeSessionName assertions for intent-first format. Add composeFooterStatus test suite. Update applyRole and title.test.ts expectations. Depends on T1, T2.

title: T2: Wire footer refresh in title.ts
description: Import composeFooterStatus + STATUS_KEY into title.ts. After pi.setSessionName, call ctx.ui.setStatus. Update docstrings. Depends on T1.

title: T1: Add INTENT_PLACEHOLDER + composeFooterStatus + flip composeSessionName format
description: Add INTENT_PLACEHOLDER constant to schemas.ts. Flip composeSessionName to <intent> - <role> format with placeholder. Add composeFooterStatus helper. Update applyRole footer call.

title: fix session identity and packaging for v0.2.0

comments.author: lojacobs
comments.text:
[ARCH→PLANNER] proposal: openspec/changes/fix-session-identity-and-packaging/

Three changes bundled for v0.2.0:

1. **Session identity format** — flip from  to  with  placeholder. New  helper. Footer () now shows the full composed string instead of bare role name. Footer refreshes after title generation.

2. **Intercom staleness** — because  now always returns a non-empty string (placeholder when intent absent), the intercom addendum gets  from turn 1 instead of bare role or .

3. **Package distribution** — package name stays  (committed baseline is already unscoped), version bump to , CHANGELOG entry.

Specs:  (new),  (new).
ARCHITECTURE.md updated: data flows, module tables, format references.

Validate with: Change 'fix-session-identity-and-packaging' is valid

comments.author: lojacobs
comments.text:
[ARCH→PLANNER] Technical summary (angle brackets were stripped in prior comment):

Change: fix-session-identity-and-packaging

3 capabilities in this change:
- session-identity (new): Canonical identity format is `<intent> - <role>` with "Intent not defined" placeholder. New composeFooterStatus helper. Footer uses composed string, refreshes after title generation. Intercom addendum gets stable placeholder name from turn 1.
- package-distribution (new): Name stays pi-roles (already unscoped in committed baseline). Version 0.2.0. CHANGELOG entry.

Files to modify per proposal:
- package.json: bump version to 0.2.0
- CHANGELOG.md: add 0.2.0 entry
- src/apply.ts: add INTENT_PLACEHOLDER, composeFooterStatus, update composeSessionName ordering, wire footer at line ~299
- src/title.ts: import composeFooterStatus + STATUS_KEY, call ctx.ui.setStatus after title generation at line ~248
- test/apply.test.ts: update composeSessionName assertions, add composeFooterStatus tests

ARCHITECTURE.md already updated in commit 4797b1a.

Validate: openspec validate fix-session-identity-and-packaging --strict
